info.title: CC-Middleware API
info.description: REST API for managing and observing Claude Code sessions, agents, permissions, hooks, configuration, and search.

tags.name: Sessions
tags.description: Session CRUD, launch, resume, and abort

tags.name: Events
tags.description: Webhook subscriptions and event type listing

tags.name: Agents
tags.description: Runtime agent registration and team management

tags.name: Permissions
tags.description: Policy rules, pending permissions, and question answering

tags.name: Search
tags.description: Full-text session search, reindexing, and statistics

get.description: Returns server health status, version, and uptime in seconds.
Returns a summary of active sessions, registered agents, hook handlers, pending permissions, and policy rules.
Retrieve a paginated list of Claude Code sessions, optionally filtered by project directory.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of sessions to return

parameters.name: project
parameters.description: Filter sessions by project directory path

post.description: Launch a new headless Claude Code session with the given prompt and options.

get.description: Retrieve detailed information about a specific session by its ID.

put.description: Update a session's title or tag. Pass `null` for tag to clear it.

get.description: Retrieve the message transcript for a session, with pagination support.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of messages to return

post.description: Resume an existing session with a new prompt, continuing from where it left off.
Abort a currently running session. The session must be in the `running` state.

get.description: Returns all supported hook event type strings.

post.description: Register a webhook URL to receive events. Use `*` in the events array to subscribe to all event types.

get.description: List all registered webhook subscriptions.

delete.description: Delete a webhook subscription by its ID. Stops event delivery to the registered URL.

get.description: List all registered runtime agents.

post.description: Register a new runtime agent definition. Runtime agents are stored in memory and not persisted to disk.

get.description: Retrieve full details of a registered agent including its prompt.

delete.description: Unregister a runtime agent by name.

get.description: Discover and list all configured teams.
Retrieve full details of a team including its members.
Retrieve all tasks assigned to a team.
List all policy rules in the permission engine.

post.description: Add a new policy rule to the permission engine. Rules are evaluated by priority (higher priority wins).

409.description: Rule with this ID already exists

delete.description: Remove a policy rule by its ID.

get.description: List all pending permission requests awaiting resolution.

post.description: Allow or deny a pending permission request.

get.description: List all pending questions from Claude Code sessions that need user answers.

post.description: Provide answers to a pending question. The answers map is keyed by question ID.

get.description: Full-text search across session content with filtering by project, date range, tags, and status.

parameters.name: dateFrom
parameters.description: Filter by start date (ms since epoch)

parameters.name: dateTo
parameters.description: Filter by end date (ms since epoch)

parameters.name: tags
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of tags to filter by

post.description: Trigger a full reindex of all sessions. This can take a while for large session histories.

get.description: Returns statistics about the search index including session and message counts.
Returns the status of all real-time sync watchers: session watcher, config watcher, and auto-indexer.
Returns the merged effective settings from all scopes (managed, user, project, local).
Get settings for a specific scope.

put.description: Set a specific setting value at the given scope. The key uses dot-notation for nested paths.

post.description: Add a permission rule to the settings file at the given scope.

delete.description: Remove a permission rule from the settings file at the given scope.

get.description: List all installed plugins across all scopes.
Get detailed information about a specific plugin.

post.description: Enable a plugin at the specified scope.
Disable a plugin at the specified scope.

get.description: Discover and list all skill definitions from project and user scopes.
Discover and list all agent definitions from configuration files.

post.description: Create a new agent definition file at the specified scope (user or project).

put.description: Update an existing agent definition file.

get.description: Discover and list all rule definitions from configuration files.
Discover and list all configured MCP (Model Context Protocol) servers.
Returns the project memory index including the memory directory path, index content, and file count.
List all files in the project memory directory.
Read the contents of a specific memory file by name.
List memory entries for all known projects.
Discover and list all CLAUDE.md files from user and project scopes.

message.description: Raw message payload from the transcript (opaque)

prompt.description: The prompt to send to Claude Code

agent.description: Agent name to use for the session

model.description: Model to use for this continuation

result.description: Final text result from the session

structuredOutput.description: Structured output if outputFormat was specified

events.description: Event types to subscribe to (use '*' for all)

headers.description: Custom headers to include in webhook delivery

secret.description: Shared secret for webhook signature verification

answers.description: Map of question ID to answer string

IndexStats.description: Index statistics from the session indexer
